skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies.
skill1.note: fullBurstEnter (not burstCast) per hard rule 6 — fires on every team FB regardless of who bursted; correct as worded.
TREASURE value (11.85→20.09). Modeled as hitRatePct which is INERT in engine; real effect is a proven-but-unmeasured core-hit-rate lift (⚑3 / caveat 1).

skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies with a Shotgun.
skill1.note: TREASURE favorite-item block added 2026-07-17; includes self. Team-wide SG blast radius — caveat 2 warns to run /sim-battery before SG-team board claims.
Large SG-ally ATK buff, TREASURE reconcile.

skill2.kitLine: Activates after 10 normal attack(s). Affects 3 enemy unit(s) with the lowest remaining HP.
skill2.note: '10 attacks' read as 10 trigger PULLS = hitCount 100 (engine counts +hitsPerShot=10 per pull, sim.ts:1727); anchored by same-chassis brid-silent-track pull measurement but unmeasured for drake — 10× cadence lever (⚑2 / caveat 3). '3 lowest-HP enemies' collapses to ONE instance on the single partless boss (fidelity note; would triple in multi-enemy content — nothing droppable).

skill2.kitLine: Deals 98.55% of final ATK as damage.
skill2.note: Rider crits at sheet rate (engine default crit ON), no core (no core-strike text), FB by timing (noFb NOT set — ⚑5 records the default).

skill2.kitLine: Activates after 5 normal attack(s). Affects 1 enemy unit(s) with the lowest remaining HP.
skill2.note: TREASURE 2nd nuke added 2026-07-17; '5 attacks' = 5 pulls = hitCount 50, same pull-vs-pellet convention as the 98.55% rider; single boss = 1 target (⚑2 / caveat 3).

skill2.kitLine: Deals 201.6% of final ATK as damage.
skill2.note: Same rider defaults as the 98.55% nuke.

burst.note: Single partless boss = the one target in range.

burst.kitLine: Deals 3009.6% of final ATK as damage.
burst.note: TREASURE upgrade 1254→3009.6. Burst-cast instant damage is auto-FB-exempt by engine cast-instant rule (noFb never set).
Cap raise is dynamic — no instant ammo grant assumed; fills to round(9×1.7218)=15 only if a reload lands inside the 10s window, so value rides on reload alignment with burst cast (⚑4 / caveat 4).
TREASURE self AD buff added 2026-07-17. Correctly encoded as attackDamagePct (Attack Damage bucket), distinct from skill1's atkPct (ATK bucket).

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: Hit Rate ▲ 20.09% (TREASURE) modeled as hitRatePct, which is inert in the engine — real effect (core-hit-rate lift) proven but unmeasured (= note ⚑3).
documentedConfounds.why: A real, proven damage-relevant buff produces ZERO effect in sim → drake's number is understated by an unquantified core-hit-rate lift. Genuine fidelity gap source.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: TREASURE 'all Shotgun-wielding allies' ATK 63.88 + Max Ammo 50.14 hits every SG ally incl. self on FB enter — run /sim-battery before any board claim on SG teams.
documentedConfounds.why: Fully modeled in skill1[1]; not a drake sim/real fidelity gap. It is a team-attribution/blast-radius warning — relevant only to team-level battery comparisons, not drake's own number.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: both nukes read '10/5 attacks' as trigger PULLS (hitCount 100/50), anchored by same-chassis brid-silent-track measurement but unmeasured for drake — pull-vs-pellet is a 10× cadence lever on each (= note ⚑2).
documentedConfounds.why: If 'attacks' means pellets not pulls, both nuke cadences are 10× hotter (hitCount 10/5) — a massive damage swing on two recurring nukes. Largest single lever in the kit.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Max Ammunition Capacity ▲ 72.18%/10s only pays out when a reload lands inside the window (cap raise fills on next reload; no instant ammo grant assumed) (= note ⚑4).
documentedConfounds.why: Extra ~6 shots (9→15) in the 10s window are meaningful damage; whether they materialize depends on reload alignment. If the game instantly grants rounds at cast, sim understates; if no reload lands, the line is near-inert. Open measurement, direction uncertain.

documentedConfounds.text: note ⚑1 [MANDATORY]: CADENCE TUPLE — pullsPerSec at SG class default 1.5 + reloadFrames 111 (datamine) + rolling-reload behavior; not escalated (9-round mag at 1.5/s empties ~6s, no <1s tell).
documentedConfounds.why: Fire-rate/reload cadence drives total pull count over 180s for an SG attacker; any error scales all of drake's damage (NA, both S2 nukes, burst economy). Datamine-unreliable, unmeasured.

documentedConfounds.text: note ⚑5: noFb on the S2 98.55% rider — default OFF (FB by timing); set noFb:true only with measured FB-OFF popup evidence.
documentedConfounds.why: Whether the recurring rider benefits from the Full Burst multiplier is a meaningful damage lever; if the rider is actually FB-exempt and sim treats it as FB-eligible, sim overstates.

documentedConfounds.text: note ⚑6: SG per-unit landing — estimate = class SG_LANDING_BY_BAND default; per-unit landing fraction unmeasured.
documentedConfounds.why: Landing fraction gates how many of the 10 pellets actually hit; per-unit deviation from the class default shifts effective damage. Anchored only by class default, not drake-specific.

authorIntentSummary: Parser-baseline (explicit HYPOTHESIS, not a validated model) merged with a prior partial-hand override, then a 2026-07-17 TREASURE/favorite-item reconcile that added the SG-ally ATK/MaxAmmo block, the second S2 nuke (201.6% at hitCount 50), the burst upgrade 1254→3009.6, and the self Attack Damage 31.68 buff. All five kit lines are encoded as blocks and the unmodeled arrays are genuinely empty — no silent drops. Key approximations: S2 '10/5 attacks' read as trigger pulls (hitCount 100/50) anchored by a same-chassis brid-silent-track measurement; Hit Rate kept as the engine-inert hitRatePct stat because the real core-hit-rate lift is proven but unmeasured; burst Max Ammo assumes no instant ammo grant (pays only on an in-window reload). The unit is MODEL_ONLY and was never fielded (not owned), so every ⚑ is an unmeasured estimate requiring hand-tune + board validation before any number is trusted.
